stemHtml: An instructor and student are flying IFR at night in a non-pressurised aircraft with no supplemental oxygen. During the flight, the instructor notices the student having a significant reduction in night vision. Which physiological threshold has likely been reached, and what altitude or range of altitudes is associated with this threshold?

options.b: The critical threshold, at 15 000 to 18 000 ft.
options.d: The arousal threshold, between 10 000 and 12 000 ft.
